title: Shadow & SoulSilver Lugia Addon
description: I made a Shadow Lugia addon for Cobblemon. Use this as a data and resource pack to amplify your experience!
body:
- I wanted to add Shadow Lugia to Cobblemon, so here he is. I'm a competitive player and so I wanted a Lugia who could compete with Ho-Oh in Ubers and fit to his lore as the guardian of the seas. 

- All models created by ASHISK.

- Has a 0.5 Weight in the "minecraft:warm_ocean" and "#minecraft:is_ocean" biomes. 

- For a detailed view of my addons click here: [CavsCobblemonRoadmap](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1wX7C7yR1veTndSJjpURQvxPYsnEIn1YI_HHSgrjR42w/edit?usp=sharing)
